narration: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.

narration: Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.
visual_description: Context visual: Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.

narration: But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bombs.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bomb
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bomb
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bomb

narration: When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.
visual_description: Evidence visual: When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.

narration: They can create stunning auroras, but also disrupt power grids, leading to blackouts. It’s a cosmic balancing act!
visual_description: Payoff visual: They can create stunning auroras, but also disrupt power grids, leading to blackouts. It’s a cosmic balancing act!
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: They can create stunning auroras, but also disrupt power grids, leading to blackouts. It’s a cosmic balancing act!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: They can create stunning auroras, but also disrupt power grids, leading to blackouts. It’s a cosmic balancing act!
